name: 48hr-launch-blueprint
description: Five-skill business validation toolkit based on Noah Kagan's Million Dollar Weekend framework. Guides users from idea generation through offer crafting to getting 3 paying customers in 48 hours — before building anything. Skills: Mindset Reset (Freedom Number + rejection desensitization), Idea Generator (Customer First Approach + 4 idea lenses), Business Model Validator (market test + One-Minute Business Model + Revenue Dials), Dream Ten Launcher (named prospect list + offer crafting + outreach prep), Validation Debrief (scorecard analysis + pivot-or-proceed). Use these skills to validate any new business idea, offer, or pivot with real money before investing in build.
